# Commands that should NOT trigger any rules (true negatives).
# These are normal, everyday terminal commands.

ls -la
cd ~/Documents
echo "hello world"
git status
git log --oneline -10
git diff HEAD
npm install
npm run dev
python3 --version
pip install requests
cat README.md
mkdir -p src/components
cp file.txt file_backup.txt
mv old_name.txt new_name.txt
grep -r "TODO" src/
find . -name "*.py"
curl https://api.github.com/users/octocat
wget https://example.com/file.txt
ssh user@myserver.com
python3 -m http.server 8080
docker ps
docker build -t myapp .
kubectl get pods
ping google.com
ipconfig
ifconfig
top
ps aux
kill 1234
chmod 755 script.sh
chmod 644 config.json
